name: GIGABYTE X870I AORUS PRO ICE Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8400(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB4 Type-C (DP Alt mode) - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A
shortName: GIGABYTE X870I AORUS PRO ICE Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: Mini-ITX AM5 motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5-8400 support, USB4, and Wi-Fi 7 for ultra-compact builds.
